ops.text: Plan approved (plans/honest-nulls-negatives-that-crystalline-alpaca.md): demote judge-opinion frozen frames from arbiter to guidance; all model scoring/judging/labeling/eval = fable (gpt-5.6-sol after 07-24), never opus; human gold via cc-present labeling tool (golden packet + disagreement adjudication); flip live watcher to deliver. Pre-flight: working copies clean (cc-steer @ b067ed3c, spawnllm @ 32c4553d); mirror rsync from yasyf@yasyf started (was stale since 07-07); claude CLI drives claude-fable-5 (smoke FABLE-OK); spawnllm gap found — CLAUDE_MODELS hardcodes large→opus, no fable: extending spawnllm with exact-model passthrough as part of Lane 1a. Dispatching build wave: 7 parallel opus-xhigh implementation lanes (1a harness+spawnllm, 1b cc-present tool, 1c dedup/mine/probs, 1d live monitor, E41/E37/E40 harnesses) — code only, no scoring; all scoring runs land on fable afterward.
